name: messages_send
description: Send a text message to a user on Messenger. Specify the recipient user ID and message text.

parameters.name: recipient_id
parameters.description: The PSID (Page-Scoped ID) of the Messenger recipient.

parameters.name: message_text
parameters.description: The text content of the message to send (max 2000 characters).
parameters.example: Hello! How can I help you today?

parameters.name: messaging_type
parameters.description: The messaging type: RESPONSE, UPDATE, or MESSAGE_TAG.

parameters.name: tag
parameters.description: Message tag for sending outside the 24-hour window. Required when messaging_type is MESSAGE_TAG.

message.text: Hello! How can I help you today?
